log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Bugbear — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:11+3=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:6+-2=4 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Bugbear — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub: [d20:15+6=21 vs AC 15] HIT! 19 damage. Bugbear — Unarmored Caster HP: 48/67
→ Bugbear — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 6 vs DC 10]
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Bugbear — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).

=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
